items.title: Venus Williams, 45, to play French Open doubles
items.summary: Venus Williams will play in the women's doubles at the French Open this month together with Hailey Baptiste, who is 21 years her junior.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Before Ted Lasso, Cristo Fernández had pro soccer ...
items.summary: You may know Cristo Fernández as Dani Rojas in the hit series Ted Lasso, but now he's living out his soccer dreams for real with El Paso Locomotive.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: England ready to go back to 'world-class' Robinson
items.summary: Rob Key says Sussex captain has 'done what was required of him' after ending two-year spell on outer
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
